roles.name: Dungeon Master
roles.description: Sets the campaign — designs the over-arching solution and keeps the party on the rails.

roles.name: Party Leader
roles.description: Marshals the party of delivery, holds the timeline, and answers to the Mayor's office.

roles.name: AV Club President
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields and permission sets — keeps the radio tuned and the projector humming.

roles.name: Hellfire Codecaster
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform features from the basement of Hawkins High.

roles.name: Hawkins Lab Lead Scientist
roles.description: Runs the lab — sets standards and guides the senior practitioners on every experiment.

roles.name: Senior Hawkins Lab Researcher
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced craft — knows where the bodies are buried.

roles.name: Hawkins Lab Researcher
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the senior researcher's eye.

roles.name: Starcourt Mall Maintenance Chief
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the underground systems beyond.

roles.name: Senior Mall Tech
roles.description: Lays the wires of API, middleware, and event flows under the Maintenance Chief's plan.

roles.name: Mall Tech Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts and the Russian-coded patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Scoops Troop Inspector
roles.description: Tastes every flavor before it ships — finds the sourness in the build before it reaches the customer.

roles.name: Family Video Marketing Director
roles.description: Lifts the megaphone for product and message — leads all marketing craft in the storefront.

roles.name: Senior Family Video Promoter
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call to gather and convert the rental crowd.

roles.name: Family Video Clerk
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the daily rewinds.

roles.name: Hawkins High Reporter
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal customer and the engineering basement.

roles.name: Senior Hellfire Codecaster
roles.description: Veteran of the basement — leads the deepest and most arcane platform builds.

roles.name: Junior AV Club Member
roles.description: Apprentice with a walkie and a notebook — picks up tickets and learns the craft.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Hawkins PD & Gov — Case Files Modernization

the-party.name: Roll for Initiative
the-party.description: Discovery sign-off — character sheets approved, dice rolled.

the-party.name: Forge the +1 Sword
the-party.description: Build kickoff: weapons readied for the first encounter.

the-party.name: Audience at the Wheeler Basement
the-party.description: Mid-project gate: solution review with the full party.

the-party.name: Snow Ball Phase Invoice
the-party.description: Phase invoice trigger: Hawkins Middle dance fully provisioned.

the-party.name: Defeat the Demogorgon
the-party.description: Go-Live: the boss is down and the campaign world saved.

the-party.name: Closing Credits Hand-off
the-party.description: Hyper-care close: ownership passed to next session's DM.

byers-wheeler-family.name: Move-in Day Kickoff
byers-wheeler-family.description: Project kickoff: boxes unpacked, alphabet wall mounted.

byers-wheeler-family.name: Christmas Lights Strung
byers-wheeler-family.description: Build phase: alphabet wall fully wired and tested.

byers-wheeler-family.name: Parent-Teacher Conference
byers-wheeler-family.description: UAT gate: school records validated with Karen and Joyce.

byers-wheeler-family.name: Thanksgiving Dinner Live
byers-wheeler-family.description: Go-Live: the family table seats everyone, no leftovers.

byers-wheeler-family.name: Holiday Card Mailing
byers-wheeler-family.description: Hyper-care close: the family is back together, photos out.

byers-wheeler-family.name: Final Family Invoice
byers-wheeler-family.description: Final invoice: cost split between the Wheelers and the Byers.

hawkins-pd-and-government.name: First Missing Person Filed
hawkins-pd-and-government.description: Discovery: Will's case opened, file system online.

hawkins-pd-and-government.name: Stake Out the Lab
hawkins-pd-and-government.description: Build: surveillance perimeter around Hawkins National Lab deployed.

hawkins-pd-and-government.name: Mayor's Audit
hawkins-pd-and-government.description: Solution review with the Mayor's office and DoE liaison.

hawkins-pd-and-government.name: Lab Lockdown Live
hawkins-pd-and-government.description: Go-Live: case files migrated, station fully operational.

hawkins-pd-and-government.name: Cold Case Cleared
hawkins-pd-and-government.description: Project close: backlog of unsolved cases reviewed and stamped.

hawkins-pd-and-government.name: Departmental Final Bill
hawkins-pd-and-government.description: Final invoice from the Hawkins PD and DoE.

upside-down-and-villains.name: First Gate Detected
upside-down-and-villains.description: Kickoff: rift signature confirmed beneath Hawkins Lab.

upside-down-and-villains.name: Map the Hive Mind
upside-down-and-villains.description: Discovery: Mind Flayer's tendril network charted.

upside-down-and-villains.name: Containment Field Built
upside-down-and-villains.description: Build: gate surveillance and shadow tracking platform deployed.

upside-down-and-villains.name: Vecna Curse Diagnostic
upside-down-and-villains.description: UAT acceptance: music-memory countermeasure validated against Creel.

upside-down-and-villains.name: Gate Sealed
upside-down-and-villains.description: Go-Live + handoff: rift closed, Upside Down quarantined.

upside-down-and-villains.name: Russian Black-budget Settle
upside-down-and-villains.description: Final invoice routed via covert channels — payment in rubles or favors.

Will Byers.notes: Recovery week — recurring Upside Down flashbacks, doctor's orders.

Eleven Hopper.notes: Eggos and waffles run with Hop — overdue.

Mike Wheeler.notes: Family trip to Lenora Hills to see El.

Dustin Henderson.notes: Camp Know Where — annual radio camp.

Max Mayfield.notes: Cemetery visit and Walkman therapy session.

Jonathan Byers.notes: Photography assignment for the school paper.

Nancy Wheeler.notes: Hawkins Post deadline week — investigative deep dive.

Jim Hopper.notes: Cabin maintenance and a fishing trip — non-negotiable.

Murray Bauman.notes: Conspiracy research retreat at the Illinois bunker.

Billy Hargrove.notes: Lifeguard shift at the Hawkins Community Pool.
